metadata._description: Azure SQL Database Security Detection Query Pack - Replacement for MDC Defender for SQL

properties.displayName: SQL DB - Brute Force Login Detection
properties.description: Detects IPs with multiple failed authentication attempts against Azure SQL Database, indicating potential brute force attacks.
properties.body:
let FailedLoginThreshold = 10;
SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION" or ActionName has "LOGIN"
| where Succeeded == false
| extend ServerName = LogicalServerName
| summarize
    FailedLogins = count(),
    FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated),
    DistinctUsers = dcount(ServerPrincipalName),
    AttemptedUsers = make_set(ServerPrincipalName, 100),
    TargetDatabases = make_set(DatabaseName, 10)
    by ClientIp, ServerName
| where FailedLogins >= FailedLoginThreshold
| extend AttackDurationMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', LastAttempt, FirstAttempt)
| project-reorder ClientIp, ServerName, FailedLogins, AttackDurationMinutes, DistinctUsers, AttemptedUsers, TargetDatabases, FirstAttempt, LastAttempt
| order by FailedLogins desc

properties.displayName: SQL DB - Anomalous Login from Unfamiliar IP
properties.description: Detects successful logins from IPs not seen in the past 14-day baseline period.
properties.body:
let baseline_period = 14d;
let detection_period = 1d;
let KnownIPs = SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated between(ago(baseline_period + detection_period) .. ago(detection_period))
| where Succeeded == true
| where ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION"
| distinct ClientIp;
SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(detection_period)
| where Succeeded == true
| where ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION"
| where ClientIp !in (KnownIPs)
| extend ServerName = LogicalServerName
| summarize
    LoginCount = count(),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    Users = make_set(ServerPrincipalName, 10),
    Databases = make_set(DatabaseName, 10),
    Applications = make_set(ApplicationName, 10)
    by ClientIp, ServerName
| project-reorder ClientIp, ServerName, LoginCount, FirstSeen, Users, Databases, Applications
| order by LoginCount desc

properties.displayName: SQL DB - Anomalous Login from Unusual Application
properties.description: Detects successful logins from applications not seen in the past 14-day baseline.
properties.body:
let baseline_period = 14d;
let detection_period = 1d;
let KnownApps = SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated between(ago(baseline_period + detection_period) .. ago(detection_period))
| where Succeeded == true
| where ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION"
| where isnotempty(ApplicationName)
| distinct ApplicationName;
SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(detection_period)
| where Succeeded == true
| where ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION"
| where isnotempty(ApplicationName)
| where ApplicationName !in (KnownApps)
| extend ServerName = LogicalServerName
| summarize
    LoginCount = count(),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    Users = make_set(ServerPrincipalName, 10),
    IPs = make_set(ClientIp, 10)
    by ApplicationName, ServerName
| order by LoginCount desc

properties.description: Detects successful logins outside business hours (20:00-06:00 UTC), which may indicate unauthorized access.
properties.body:
let OffHoursStart = 20;
let OffHoursEnd = 6;
SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where Succeeded == true
| where ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION"
| extend HourOfDay = hourofday(TimeGenerated)
| where HourOfDay >= OffHoursStart or HourOfDay < OffHoursEnd
| extend ServerName = LogicalServerName
| summarize
    LoginCount = count(),
    DistinctIPs = dcount(ClientIp),
    IPs = make_set(ClientIp, 10),
    Databases = make_set(DatabaseName, 10),
    Applications = make_set(ApplicationName, 10)
    by ServerPrincipalName, ServerName
| order by LoginCount desc

properties.displayName: SQL DB - Privilege Escalation / Permission Changes
properties.description: Monitors GRANT, REVOKE, role membership changes and other permission modifications that may indicate privilege escalation.
properties.body:
SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where ActionName has_any ("GRANT", "REVOKE", "ADD MEMBER", "DROP MEMBER", "ALTER ROLE")
    or ActionName has_any ("DATABASE PERMISSION CHANGE", "DATABASE PRINCIPAL CHANGE", "SERVER PERMISSION CHANGE", "SERVER PRINCIPAL CHANGE")
| extend ServerName = LogicalServerName
| project TimeGenerated, ServerName, ActionName, ServerPrincipalName, ClientIp, DatabaseName, ObjectName, Statement, Succeeded
| order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.description: Tracks CREATE, ALTER, DROP, RENAME operations on database objects including tables, views, procedures, and functions.
properties.body:
SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where ActionName has_any ("CREATE", "ALTER", "DROP", "RENAME")
| where ClassTypeDescription has_any ("OBJECT", "TABLE", "VIEW", "PROCEDURE", "FUNCTION", "INDEX", "SCHEMA", "TYPE", "TRIGGER")
    or ActionName has "SCHEMA OBJECT"
| extend ServerName = LogicalServerName
| project TimeGenerated, ServerName, ActionName, ClassTypeDescription, ServerPrincipalName, ClientIp, DatabaseName, SchemaName, ObjectName, Statement, Succeeded
| order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.displayName: SQL DB - High-Volume Data Access (Exfiltration Risk)
properties.description: Detects queries returning unusually high row counts, which may indicate data exfiltration attempts.
properties.body:
let ResponseRowThreshold = 10000;
SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where ResponseRows > ResponseRowThreshold
| extend ServerName = LogicalServerName
| summarize
    LargeQueries = count(),
    TotalRowsReturned = sum(ResponseRows),
    MaxRows = max(ResponseRows),
    AvgDurationMs = avg(DurationMs)
    by ServerPrincipalName, ClientIp, ServerName, DatabaseName
| order by TotalRowsReturned desc

properties.displayName: SQL DB - SQL Injection Pattern Detection
properties.description: Detects potential SQL injection attempts by matching suspicious patterns in SQL statements including UNION SELECT, tautologies, comment injection, and SQL Server specific attacks.
properties.body:
SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where isnotempty(Statement)
| where Statement matches regex "(?i)(UNION\\s+SELECT|OR\\s+1\\s*=\\s*1|DROP\\s+TABLE|--\\s|/\\*.*\\*/|SLEEP\\s*\\(|BENCHMARK\\s*\\(|WAITFOR\\s+DELAY|xp_cmdshell|CHAR\\s*\\(\\d+\\))"
| extend ServerName = LogicalServerName
| project TimeGenerated, ServerName, ServerPrincipalName, ClientIp, DatabaseName, Statement, Succeeded, ApplicationName
| order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.description: Monitors high-privilege operations including backup, restore, bulk data operations, and DBCC commands that could indicate data theft or tampering.
properties.body:
SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where ActionName has_any ("BACKUP", "RESTORE", "BULK", "DBCC", "EXPORT", "IMPORT")
    or Statement has_any ("BACKUP", "RESTORE", "BULK INSERT", "OPENROWSET", "OPENDATASOURCE", "BCP", "DBCC")
| extend ServerName = LogicalServerName
| project TimeGenerated, ServerName, ActionName, ServerPrincipalName, ClientIp, DatabaseName, Statement, Succeeded
| order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.displayName: SQL DB - High Login Failure Rate
properties.description: Monitors servers with abnormally high authentication failure rates, indicating potential widespread credential attacks.
properties.body:
let FailureRateThreshold = 30.0;
SQLSecurityAuditEvents
| where ActionName has "AUTHENTICATION" or ActionName has "LOGIN"
| extend ServerName = LogicalServerName
| summarize
    TotalLogins = count(),
    SuccessfulLogins = countif(Succeeded == true),
    FailedLogins = countif(Succeeded == false),
    DistinctFailedIPs = dcountif(ClientIp, Succeeded == false),
    FailedUsers = make_set_if(ServerPrincipalName, Succeeded == false, 10),
    FailedIPs = make_set_if(ClientIp, Succeeded == false, 10)
    by ServerName
| extend FailureRate = round(todouble(FailedLogins) / todouble(TotalLogins) * 100, 2)
| where FailureRate > FailureRateThreshold and TotalLogins > 10
| project ServerName, TotalLogins, SuccessfulLogins, FailedLogins, FailureRate, DistinctFailedIPs, FailedUsers, FailedIPs
| order by FailureRate desc
